---
title: "CV"
---

```{=html}
<p style="margin-bottom: 2rem;">
  <a href="assets/cv.pdf" class="about-link" download>
    <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download PDF
  </a>
</p>
```

## Education

**Sciences Po (Institut d'Études Politiques de Paris)**, Paris, *Master of Research in Economics* · 2023–2025
GPA: 4.0/4.0

**Bard College**, Annandale-on-Hudson, *Bachelor of Arts in Economics* · 2019–2023
GPA: 3.8/4.0. Awards: Levy Economics Institute Prize (2023); OSUN Certificate in Public Policy and Economic Analysis (2023); Amicus Foundation Scholarship (2021).

---

## Experience

**Penn Wharton Budget Model**, Philadelphia
*Analyst* · June 2026–Present

**Department of Economics, Trinity College Dublin**, Dublin
*Predoctoral Research Assistant* · 2025–2026

**The Economic Journal, Royal Economic Society**, Paris
*Replicator* · 2024–2025

---

## Internships

**Kiel Institute for the World Economy**
*Research Intern* · 2024

**Ceres, Inc.**
*Financial Regulation Intern* · 2023

**Mekong Strategic Group**, Phnom Penh
*Analytics Intern* · 2022

**OSUN – Economic Democracy Initiative**
*Student Fellow* · 2022

**Office of Illinois State Senator Heather Steans**, Chicago
*Summer Intern* · 2020

---

## Skills

**Technical:** R, STATA, Python, Julia, LaTeX, Salesforce, Microsoft Office, Optical Character Recognition, Census Matching, Panel and Cross-sectional Econometrics, DSGE Modeling

**Languages:** English (Native), French (B1), Khmer/Cambodian (Basic Work Proficiency)

---

## Leadership & Activities

**New York Southeast Asia Society**, Member · 2021–Present

**Young Scholars Initiative**, Student Member · 2019–Present

**Bard College Economics Club**, President · 2020–2022
